data.title: Ripple News: XRP Devs Propose Metadata Standard For XRPL Tokens
data.description:
In recent Ripple news, developers have proposed a new metadata standard, which has the potential to alter the way tokens operate and are recognized on the XRP Ledger. RippleX released the proposal, named XLS-0089d, that would enhance the organization and visibility of tokens.
source: https://www.thecoinrepublic.com/2025/07/18/ripple-news-xrp-devs-propose-metadata-standard-for-xrpl-tokens/

data.title: WLFI spent $200,000 to purchase BANK, TAG, EGL1, LIBERTY, B
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News According to Onchain Lens monitoring, the Trump family's crypto project World Liberty Finance address 0xa713...59f invested $200,000 to purchase five tokens, including 636,683 BANK, 72.92 million TAG, 396,371 EGL1, 409,387 LIBERTY and 78,922 B, with each asset purchased for $40,000.

data.title: JPMorgan says regulators outside US appear to prefer tokenized bank deposits over stablecoins
data.description:
Non-bearer tokenized bank deposits settle at face value between accounts, unlike stablecoins, which can trade below par, JPMorgan said.
source: https://www.theblock.co/post/363419/jpmorgan-tokenized-bank-deposits-stablecoins?utm_source=rss&utm_medium=rss

data.title: Bitcoin Miner Backed by Peter Thiel Now Holds $1,000,000,000 Worth of Ethereum in a Bid To Become the MicroStrategy of ETH
data.description:
A Bitcoin (BTC) mining company backed by tech billionaire Peter Thiel just announced that it is on track to become one of the world’s largest holders of Ethereum (ETH).
source: https://dailyhodl.com/2025/07/18/bitcoin-miner-backed-by-peter-thiel-now-holds-1000000000-worth-of-ethereum-in-a-bid-to-become-the-microstrategy-of-eth/

data.title: JPMorgan: Regulators outside the U.S. prefer tokenized bank deposits over stablecoins
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: JPMorgan Chase analyzed that regulators in many countries, including the Bank of England, tend to support non-bearer tokenized bank deposits rather than stablecoins, because the former is settled at face value and is more in line with the "singleness" principle of legal currency. Although stablecoins still have advantages in liquidity and convenience, JPM is also testing a licensed token deposit product called JPMD on Base. (TheBlock)

data.title: JPMorgan Advocates Tokenized Bank Deposits Over Stablecoins
data.description: According to Odaily, JPMorgan analysts have indicated that several regulatory bodies, including the Bank of England, are favoring tokenized bank deposits over stablecoins. This preference is due to tokenized deposits settling at face value and aligning more closely with the principle of fiat currency singularity. Despite stablecoins offering advantages in liquidity and convenience, JPMorgan is currently testing a permissioned token deposit product named JPMD on the Base platform.

data.title: German Chancellor: EU-US tariff negotiations enter final stage
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News German Chancellor Merz said in Berlin on the 18th that the German economy has reversed the recession and is moving towards recovery. He also said that the tariff negotiations between the EU and the United States have entered the final stage. The two sides are still discussing whether to adopt differentiated policies for specific industries. 
He supports the European Commission's efforts to reach an agreement. "The lower the tariff, the more beneficial it is for both sides. The tariff will ultimately hurt everyone." He also said that the US tax and spending policies have put tremendous pressure on its own budget and may lead to serious fiscal deficits. (Jinshi)

data.title: Senate Agriculture Committee to Vote on CFTC Chair Nominee
data.description: According to BlockBeats, journalist Eleanor Terrett reported that the U.S. Senate Agriculture Committee is scheduled to vote next Monday on the nomination of Brian Quintenz for the position of Chairman of the Commodity Futures Trading Commission (CFTC). The confirmation hearing for this nomination took place last month.

data.title: Ethereum’s Breakout Above The MA50 Suggests Further Upside, Here’s The Target
data.description:
Ethereum (ETH) has decisively broken above a resistance level, the 50-day Exponential Moving Average (EMA50), igniting renewed bullish momentum across the market. This breakout marks a significant shift in market trend, opening the door for a potential rally toward higher targets around the $4,000 level. Ethereum Targets $4,000 After EMA50 Breakout The Ethereum price has delivered an explosive rally after its recent breakout above the EMA50 barrier. Given this development, crypto analyst Doctor Profit has forecasted on the X social media that ETH is gearing up for a massive surge toward $4,000
source: https://www.newsbtc.com/news/ethereum/ethereum-breakout-above-ma50/
